{{Infobox character
| name = Lotta
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Lotta]] is a twelve-year-old girl and the daughter of an administrator.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Lotta]] is a little girl who hides behind a high collar.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Lotta]] is a person [[Petal]] sent out.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
